title: PM Lane 411 - Project Miner Temp Power Apparatus Completion Revenue Recognition No-Live Design Packet
authority_basis: Lane 352 return-label classification as OUTPUT_WRITE_REQUEST_SEPARATE_ADMISSION_REQUIRED plus standing PM coordination authority for no-live design authoring only.

source_classification.source_lane: PM Lane 352 - Project Miner Temp Power Remaining Finance And Source Rule Question Card No-Live Packet
source_classification.reason: The request describes future revenue-recognition writes and therefore requires a separate packet, but this lane stops at design only.

recognition_model.mixed_rate_note: No schema special-casing is required because estimator bid-time blending is already embedded in the adjusted pool totals.

snapshot_strategy.design_correction: Keep snapshot_kind as a field name but store it as constrained text rather than a literal PostgreSQL enum so future change orders do not require enum migrations.

import_contract_amendment.selected_path: sibling import-contract-support packet after Lane 278 core import
import_contract_amendment.multi_scope_rule: Allocate pool totals to scopes by scope_hours / project_hours weight at import time.
import_contract_amendment.named_design_assumption: Multi-scope pool allocation is governed by scope_hours / project_hours unless a later lane explicitly supersedes it.
import_contract_amendment.implementation_fixture_required: Include an explicit multi-scope fixture so single-scope Miner data cannot mask scope-normalization bugs.
required_no_go_checks: sum of scope pool totals equals snapshot contract_value
sum of apparatus quoted_revenue reconciles to snapshot contract_value within rounding tolerance

constraints: stored recognition_rate_per_hour must reconcile to contract_value / total_quoted_hours within tolerance
revenue_recognition_authority default stays not_admitted and the inserting route must set any admitted authority explicitly
quoted_hours required for Onsite Labor and Offsite Labor
quoted_hours null for Travel and Outside Services

apparatus_additions.rollout_rule: Recognition events are allowed only when apparatus.contract_snapshot_id is non-null; later implementation must either backfill legacy rows explicitly or keep event creation gated.

constraints: zero baseline forces zero amount, zero percent, and null reverses_event_id
recognized events require positive amount, recognition_percent=100.00, and null reverses_event_id in v1
reversed events require negative amount and reverses_event_id
cross_row_trigger_rules: reverses_event_id must reference an original apparatus_revenue_recognized row
reversal contract_snapshot_id must equal original event contract_snapshot_id
v1 disallows double reversal of an already-reversed recognized row

scope_financials_view.derivation_rule: Net apparatus_revenue_events excluding zero-baseline rows, then multiply scope recognition by each scope pool amount divided by total_scope_pool_amount.
scope_financials_view.critical_note: Per-pool recognized revenue must normalize inside the scope, not against the full project contract value, or multi-scope projects will underreport by the scope-share factor.
scope_financials_view.ui_note: Until actuals populate actual_amount, consuming UI should show Cost data pending or suppress gross-margin display.

lane_280_status_extension.route: existing apparatus status mutation route extended for PM disposition to Complete
preconditions: apparatus belongs to admitted imported project and scope
quoted_hours, quoted_revenue, and contract_snapshot_id already frozen
snapshot belongs to the same project
no unreversed recognized event exists unless exact same payload replay

reversal_and_baseline.reversal_pattern: Insert a new apparatus_revenue_reversed row with negative recognized_amount and reverses_event_id pointing at the original event.
reversal_and_baseline.baseline_pattern: Seed one apparatus_revenue_zero_baseline row per apparatus and snapshot with zero amount and zero percent.
reversal_and_baseline.same_snapshot_rule: Reversal rows must inherit the original event contract_snapshot_id and may not cross snapshots.
reversal_and_baseline.netting_rule: Sum recognized_amount for all non-baseline rows; reversal rows remain negative.

validation: Decision-label search across touched Lane 411 files
Selected-outcome search across touched Lane 411 files
git diff --check on touched Lane 411 files
next_truth: A separate later admission packet is required before schema creation, import amendments, status-mutation extension, baseline seeding, or live apparatus revenue recognition writes can occur.
